name: design-system-publication
title: Publication
description: Print-inspired visual language for books, magazines, and reports with editorial grids and expressive typography.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Publication design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
